Defence minister Al Carns quit tonight as he accused Labour of 'failing' Britain's armed forces, saying he could not 'in good conscience' back the Defence Investment Plan. The Armed Forces minister followed his boss, defence secretary John Healey, out of the door as he said the long-delayed document was 'not built for the threat we face'. The latest resignation by the decorate former marine was swiftly followed by an announcement from Number 10 that Dan Jarvis would be replacing Healey as the new defence secretary.

I was reassured by Gp that my extremely heavy and painful periods are absolutely normal for woman my age as my body is preparing for hormonal changes...I kept coming back to doctors and was eventually referred to see a gynecologist after waiting 10 months! After few visits, scans, womb biopsy I was told: you got stage 1a endometrial cancer( uterus cancer). I was rushed to emergency surgery to remove my uterus, ovaries, fallopian tubes. Nearly 18 months later I am still cancer free and doing amazing. My symptoms were: extremely heavy and long periods, lower back pain and extreme tiredness which I thought was simply a sign of getting older. I was also spotting between periods and during exercising. Most cases of heavy periods are not cancer!!!

Anna complained to doctors more than 20 times over seven years about her heavy periods, only to be told her health problems were due to her age.

I found moderate fasting radically improved my weight loss journey when I was stuck at a weight with Mounjaro. If you have never fasted before, try a one day fast where you eat only a protein rich/low carb meal late afternoon followed by a ‘normal’ day of eating, then another fast on Day 3 and so on. Take Saturday and Sunday off from this. So fast on Monday, Weds and Friday. You should find this kickstarts your weight loss especially if you eat fairly healthily on the normal 3 meals-a-day days. Good luck.

When I started taking Mounjaro last year I found losing weight was easy. In eight months I lost two stone, bringing me just a few pounds short of my goal, but then I hit the dreaded MJ plateau.

It has now emerged that as his England teammates jetted out to the USA to start their World Cup preparations, Maguire faced further disappointment as he was convicted of breaking the speed limit in his £130,000 Range Rover. The incident happened on December 28 last year, when he was caught driving at 37mph in a 30mph zone in Altringham, Greater Manchester, on the route between United's Old Trafford stadium and his Cheshire home. The defender was prosecuted and convicted in the single justice procedure last week, at the same time that two of his United teammates were also facing criminal proceedings over speeding offences.

  • It is such a shame, that long gone are the core concepts of imagination, fun, good stories and interesting characters.   • I was hospitalised after my first round of Chemo, with Nutropenia!! Chemo is not nice (especially losing your hair) and all the horrid side effects that come with it. Don’t give up…..there is light at the end of the tunnel!! Just click your heels and get on with it!! I was stage 3 with Triple Negative BC 14 years ago and I am still here to tell my story. An award-winning photo has revealed how a couple taught a flock of birds to migrate to Spain by flying 1,615 miles alongside them in a paraglider. Helena Wehner and Johannes Fritz are part of an Austrian conservation group known as Waldrappteam, which are dedicated to bringing the northern bald ibis to Europe. The endangered birds are raised in Germany and then made to migrate south for the winter so that it is warm enough for them to survive.

Holly Willoughby begged her driver to 'please look after me, I have three children' as she experienced her first ever hot lap of the Monaco Grand Prix track.  In a new Instagram video, the presenter, 45, was heard squealing 'oh my god' and swearing as she was thrown around the racing car.  Holly, who was dressed in a stylish blue blouse and matching shorts, pulled on a black safety helmet as she joined her driver Alan in the vehicle.

Brooklyn Beckham has confessed he can 'come across as annoying sometimes' as he reflected on his various attempts to find business success. The chef, 27, has had mixed results launching his own career, but more recently launched his hot sauce brand Cloud23.
